     The Numbers Business Report

Hellboy (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $21,903,748Details
International Box Office $32,052,732
Worldwide Box Office $53,956,480
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,547,960
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $8,880,803
Total $12,428,763
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Hellboy is back, and he’s on fire. He is called to the English countryside to battle a trio of rampaging giants. There he discovers The Blood Queen, Nimue, a resurrected ancient sorceress thirsting to avenge a past betrayal. Suddenly caught in a clash between the supernatural and the human, Hellboy is now hell-bent on stopping Nimue without triggering the end of the world.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$12,045,147 (55.0% of total gross)
Legs:1.82 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:40.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,303 opening theaters/3,303 max. theaters, 2.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $28,599,218

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 12th, 2019 (Wide) by Lionsgate
April 12th, 2019 (IMAX) by Lionsgate
International Releases: April 10th, 2019 (Wide) (South Korea)
April 11th, 2019 (Wide) (Italy)
April 11th, 2019 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
April 11th, 2019 (Wide), released as Хеллбой (Russia (CIS))
April 11th, 2019 (Wide) (Mexico)
Video Release: July 23rd, 2019 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence and gore throughout, and language
(Rating bulletin 2567 (Cert #52002), 2/27/2019)
Running Time: 120 minutes
Franchise: Hellboy
Cast, crew, or production detail: Reboot
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Demons, Revenge, Shapeshifter, Witches
Social setting: Supernatural
Source material: Dark Horse Comics
Subgenre: Action Horror
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Summit Entertainment, Millennium Films, Campbell Grobman Films, Dark Horse Entertainment, Applebox Entertainment, Lawrence Gordon, Lloyd Levin, Nu Boyana
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Hellboy is back, and he’s on fire. He is called to the English countryside to battle a trio of rampaging giants. There he discovers The Blood Queen, Nimue, a resurrected ancient sorceress thirsting to avenge a past betrayal. Suddenly caught in a clash between the supernatural and the human, Hellboy is now hell-bent on stopping Nimue without triggering the end of the world.
